briefdescription.para: Called when a full continuous-acquisition chunk is ready.

detaileddescription.para: The callback runs from the driver's handler task, not from ISR context. Keep callback work short and hand samples to an application task if processing is expensive.

briefdescription.para: Called when the continuous-acquisition task sees a recoverable error.
Opaque continuous-mode context.
Create an ADS1299 device handle from static configuration.

simplesect.para: Initialized handle value. If cfg is NULL, the returned handle is zero-initialized and not ready for ads1299_init().

briefdescription.para: Initialize the ADS1299 device.

detaileddescription.para: This configures GPIOs, adds the ADS1299 SPI device, creates the driver mutex, and runs the power-up sequence. The SPI bus must already be initialized by the application.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Deinitialize the ADS1299 device and free driver-owned resources.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Write one ADS1299 register.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Read one ADS1299 register.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (ads1299_t *dev, uint8_t start_reg, const uint8_t *data, size_t count)
memberdef.name: ads1299_write_registers

briefdescription.para: Write a contiguous ADS1299 register range.

parameterdescription.para: Number of register values in data.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Read a contiguous ADS1299 register range.

parameterdescription.para: Number of register values to read.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Send a raw ADS1299 SPI command byte.

detaileddescription.para: Prefer named helper functions for common device-control commands.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Read one raw 27-byte ADS1299 frame.

parameterdescription.para: Destination buffer of at least ADS1299_FRAME_SIZE bytes.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Read and parse one ADS1299 sample.

detaileddescription.para: DRDY must already be low before this function is called.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Assert the START pin.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Deassert the START pin.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Pulse the ADS1299 hardware RESET pin.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Send the ADS1299 RESET command.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Send the ADS1299 STANDBY command.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Send the ADS1299 WAKEUP command.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Enter ADS1299 continuous read mode.

detaileddescription.para: This sends RDATAC and is required before ads1299_start_continuous().

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Exit ADS1299 continuous read mode.

detaileddescription.para: This sends SDATAC and is required before register writes.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Begin DMA-driven continuous acquisition.

detaileddescription.para: The driver allocates DMA buffers and chunk storage, installs the DRDY ISR, starts a handler task, and calls on_chunk as chunks complete.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Stop continuous acquisition and free acquisition resources.

simplesect.para: ESP_OK on success, or an ESP-IDF error code.

briefdescription.para: Check whether continuous acquisition is active.

simplesect.para: true if continuous acquisition is active, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get the driver-owned FreeRTOS ring buffer handle.

detaileddescription.para: The returned handle is owned by the driver. Applications must not delete it.

simplesect.para: Ring buffer handle, or NULL when continuous mode is inactive.

briefdescription.para: Parse a raw ADS1299 frame.

parameterdescription.para: Raw ADS1299 frame of ADS1299_FRAME_SIZE bytes.
Timestamp to store in the parsed sample.

briefdescription.para: Convert an ADS1299 sample-rate enum to hertz.

simplesect.para: Sample rate in hertz, or 0 for an invalid value.

briefdescription.para: Public API for the ADS1299 ESP-IDF driver.

detaileddescription.para: The driver controls a Texas Instruments ADS1299 analog front-end over SPI. Applications own SPI bus initialization. The driver owns the ADS1299 SPI device handle, GPIO setup, and continuous acquisition resources.
